Motion To Compel Mental Examination Of Pltf. Mary Miller
Off Calendar Aug-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, Defendant California Pacific Medical Center's motion to compel mental examination of plaintiff, is taken off calendar, at the request of the moving party. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick Mahoney; Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR #4780

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-10-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. Michael Reed's Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for plaintiff Mary Miller is off calendar at the request of the moving party. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick Mahoney; Reporter: Kimberly Jennings, CSR 11452

MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's prior Counsel Michael Reed for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/Fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. (212)
